text:
The is a wealthy family living in Stohess District. It is the family where Elliot Gurnberg Stratmann and Carly Stratmann hail from.

History

At some point, Elliot Gurnberg Stratmann founded the Marleen company, got married and had a daughter, Carly. Eventually, he lost his wife. After the Fall of Wall Maria, Elliot had financial issues. Carly, who got a chemistry degree, decided to use her knowledge to make drugs her father would sell. 

Story

When Carly finds out some of her friends taking some of the drug she made, she got mad at her father, as he had promised to her to sell her product only in the capital. As a result, she ran away.
